author: Sofia Martínez
title: AI Website Builders vs Custom Development: What Actually Gets SMBs More Clients
description: Wix AI, Squarespace AI, and similar tools promise instant websites. Here's what they get right, what they miss, and what local businesses actually need.

sections.p: AI website builders have gotten genuinely impressive. Wix ADI, Squarespace AI, and similar tools can produce a professional-looking website in under an hour. For some businesses, that's exactly what they need. For others, it's a trap that costs them clients they never knew they lost.

Speed and cost are real advantages. A professional-looking site in 60 minutes for under $30/month is a legitimate option for a very new business that needs a web presence before they have budget for anything else. The design quality has improved enough that the aesthetic gap between AI builders and custom sites has largely closed.

For businesses with simple, transactional needs — one service, clear pricing, a contact form — an AI builder can perform just as well as a custom site. The conversion rate difference comes down to copy and credibility, not the platform.

sections.h2: Where AI builders fall short for local businesses

list: Local SEO: AI builders rarely implement LocalBusiness schema, GBP integration, or city-specific landing pages automatically.
Speed optimization: template-heavy platforms consistently score lower on Core Web Vitals, which affects ranking.
Conversion architecture: generic templates aren't built around your specific buyer journey.
Integrations: connecting your CRM, booking system, and marketing tools requires workarounds that add up.

sections.p: A $30/month AI site that ranks on page 3 and converts at 1.2% costs you more in lost clients than a $249/month custom site that ranks on page 1 and converts at 3.8%. The math on this is almost always clear when you work it out — the problem is that business owners see the monthly line item, not the invisible cost of poor performance.

sections.h2: What we build and why it performs

sections.p: Every site we build at NetWebMedia starts with conversion architecture: what does the visitor need to see, in what order, to take action? Then we layer in technical SEO, local schema, and performance optimization before a single design pixel is chosen. The result is a site that looks professional and actually does its job of generating clients.

sections.quote: An AI builder gives you a website. A properly built site gives you a sales tool. Those aren't the same thing.
